entry.title: A Learning Experience
entry.summary:
Author: Dancer612

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,269Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 78

Summary: Hyunjin comes looking for structure, not surrender. Chan offers rules, restraint, and care—and refuses to rush. What grows between them is a slow-burn dynamic built on consent, aftercare, and the quiet tension of wanting more than is given.

entry.title: You're My Jail And Paradise
entry.summary:
Author: prettylittlescars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,810Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 14

Summary: Felix has grown up with an absent mother and no father figure. Until his mother marries Christopher "Chan" Bang, who turns Felix's world upside down and inside out. Felix can't stand the man... until the night Chan makes his real intentions known, changing the game, and changing Felix's life forever.

entry.title: Relapse
entry.summary:
Author: Paboveronica_143

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,100Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 36

Summary: Jisung was your average university student. Buried in his studies, trying to finish his last year to get the hell out of his step-father's place. Until a new music teacher shows up. And three friends who seem to care more than he thought. Especially Seungmin. And his professor. WARNING: THIS IS NOT MEANT TO OFFEND AND SKZ MEMBERS, ONLY NAMES ARE USED FOR THIS FIC!

entry.title: Side Effects
entry.summary:
Author: TheLioness143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,181Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 78

Summary: ((AU Bang Chan x Female Reader)) It was only supposed to be one night. A chance to feel something again. A stolen moment with a masked stranger. No promises, just an escape. A couple of days later, you play the perfect wife at a dinner you didn’t want to attend, until you see him again. Chris is seated at the same table, unmasked, and watching you like he already knows how this ends. The stakes rise with every stolen glance. By the time the cards hit the table, you’re no longer just a wife on someone’s arm. You’re the prize. For the first time in a long time, you’re starting to wonder if that’s exactly what you want to be. Everything you’ve been running from catches up to you, surrounded by witnesses. You have to decide what comes next— whether you’re choosing freedom, or just trading one cage for another.

entry.title: Overlap
entry.summary:
Author: odysseyofmemory

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,651Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 167

Summary: He smiles at her, one thousand Chans reflected one thousand times in the mirrored elevator walls. One thousands parallel universes where she could be in an elevator with Chan in Rome late at night, with his loverboy eyes, and how many of those universes are different? How many of those Chans have loverboy eyes? How many versions of her give in to them? How many good things actually happen to those versions after 2AM? or Everyone knows idols shouldn't date their staff. Chan's not sure if he cares anymore.

entry.title: Anchored
entry.summary:
Author: Kpoplover08

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,772Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 113

Summary: Han never expected to find a place where he felt safe. After years of feeling untethered in a world that demands labels and classifications, he finds himself thrust into a polycule that sees him—really sees him. What starts as tentative trust slowly becomes something deeper: comfort, belonging, and the terrifying possibility of permanence. But choosing to be anchored means choosing vulnerability. And Han has to decide if he’s ready to stop standing alone.

entry.title: Two Ghostfaces and Nowhere to Run
entry.summary:
Author: lieslostinsilence

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,791Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 30

Summary: The silence in your house is the first thing they steal. A creaking floorboard, a distorted voice, and suddenly you are no longer alone. Two masked hunters step out of the shadows, patient and cruel, letting you run just long enough to enjoy the chase. Fear burns through you, but something darker rises with it. When they finally catch you, escape stops mattering. Panic turns into heat, control slips from your hands, and being hunted becomes something far more dangerous. Some predators do not want to kill you. They want to keep you.

entry.title: Testing The Limits
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,184Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 129

Summary: The two had been in this arrangement for quite some time now, and it worked well for them. Chan helped Jisung remain punctual, tidy, and organized. He really improved Jisung's life, and he seemed happy to do so. In return, Jisung was always good for him, sugary sweet, halting under his touch.  It had always been like that with them. He didn't need anything to change…right? Or; Sweet and submissive Jisung wants to try his hand at being a brat. His dom, Chan, rises to the occasion.

entry.title: You Don’t Get to Shrink
entry.summary:
Author: Future_Dr_Smut (Coffee_Cats_And_Vibes)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,616Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 9

Summary: After your double mastectomy and flat closure, intimacy has been careful. Gentle. Safe. Tonight, you don’t want safe. You don’t want softness. You want to be handled. Claimed. Reminded that you are still powerful, still desirable, still Chris's. This fic explores post-mastectomy with flat closure body image, negotiated dominance, consensual degradation, and the raw vulnerability of being seen fully. Healing isn’t always soft. Sometimes it kneels.

entry.title: succubus pop-up ad (not clickbait!)
entry.summary:
Author: feetslix

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,000Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 352

Summary: The candle he’d lit is still flickering on the low table, his laptop sleeping behind him, the bullshit “summon a succubus tonight” page still open. The sharp stink of marker is in the air. His heart hammers in his ears. He hasn’t slept in thirty-one hours. He hasn’t fucked in three years. There's a stranger in his studio. And he’s hard.or; Chan summons a sex demon

entry.title: Our Stray Cat
entry.summary:
Author: hellokenki

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,006Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 54

Summary: You barely get through life, your only happiness coming from your best friend Starr. One day you bump into someone on the way to class, and your life changes forever.
